task_completion.description: Agent logged into the NOSH EHR system as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the login screen with the username 'admin' entered, or the dashboard indicating the active user is the administrator.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the provider management or user profiles section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a list of users, providers, or a settings menu where provider profiles can be managed.

task_completion.description: Agent selected Dr. James Carter (demo_provider) for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the profile, settings, or edit screen specifically for 'Dr. James Carter' or the username 'demo_provider'.

task_completion.description: Agent changed the schedule time increment to 15 minutes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show an input field, dropdown, or setting for 'schedule increment', 'appointment slots', or similar, changed from 20 to 15.

task_completion.description: Agent saved the updated provider profile configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking a 'Save', 'Update', or 'Submit' button, or a confirmation message indicating the profile was successfully updated.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser and the NOSH EHR web interface, not terminal commands or direct database queries (e.g., no SQL UPDATE commands in a terminal).

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine NOSH EHR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual NOSH EHR system interface, rather than a text editor, mock HTML file, or notes application.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots do not show the browser's 'Inspect Element' or developer console being used to alter the displayed text or values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target provider to edit: Dr. James Carter (username: demo_provider). The schedule increment is initially set to 20 minutes and must be changed to 15 minutes. The agent must perform this action while logged in as 'admin'.
